**SGSC-AI Intelligence Probe Executed**

Jiangsu Yadian Communication Technology Co., Ltd. represents a stark contradiction between official size classification and physical/operational reality. Wrongly classified as a 'Large' enterprise and an 'Electronic Device Manufacturer', it is actually a highly localized, asset-light sales and engineering contracting firm. Established in 2009, its registered address is famously located in 'Room 1808' on Zhujiang Road (Nanjing's traditional electronics retail street). A careful semantic reading of its business scope reveals it strictly engages in the 'sales, installation, and maintenance' of telecom and mechanical equipment, alongside environmental/energy-saving engineering design—with zero manufacturing activities. Despite a registered capital of 36.08M RMB, only 6M RMB is paid in, and it reports 0 insured employees for 2024, confirming it is an engineering bidding shell or a micro-scale IT/Telecom systems integrator operating out of an electronics market office.
